title: ThesisDataObject
description: Immutable, deterministic handoff format between Scout → Auditor → Pulse modules. A TDO must traverse all three phases before any capital deployment is permitted.

thesis_id.description: Deterministic UUID v5 derived from thesis_claim text. Immutable after Scout emission. Format: tdo_{uuid4}.

schema_version.description: Semver of this TDO schema. Must match the version field at top-level.

phase.description: Current lifecycle stage. Pulse is prohibited from executing unless phase = AUDITED.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of Scout emission. Immutable.

last_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last phase transition.

scout.description: Output from Module 1 (Scout). Populated at SCOUTED phase. Immutable after emission.

thesis_claim.description: Single falsifiable investment claim. The canonical 'why this matters' statement.

confidence.description: Scout composite confidence score [0.0, 1.0]. Below 0.30 = LowSignalError (blocked).

query_origin.description: The original search query or sentinel topic that triggered this thesis.

trigger_source.description: What caused Scout to fire this thesis.

supporting_findings.description: Source evidence. Minimum 3 required for a valid thesis (circuit breaker threshold).

critical_disagreement.description: Counter-narrative identified by Gemini synthesis. Null if no disagreement found.

bottleneck_description.description: Free-text description of the supply chain bottleneck or technological constraint. Feeds BOM Decomposer in Auditor.

auditor.description: Output from Module 2 (Auditor). Null until phase transitions to AUDIT_PENDING. Contains physical verification and TES scoring.

audit_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical audit payload (tes_score + supply_chain + financials). Required by Pulse before any execution. Format: audit_{hex64}.

audited_at.description: UTC timestamp when audit_hash was sealed.

auditor_version.description: Semver of the Auditor module that generated this record.

tes_score.description: Technology Exposure Score. Formula: (niche_revenue / total_revenue) × (1 + CAGR) × patent_density. Range: [0.0, ∞), typically [0.0, 3.0].

patent_density.description: Patent count per $1B revenue or normalized patent score [0.0, 1.0].

data_vintage.description: Date of most recent SEC filing used.

market_cap_usd.description: Market cap in USD at time of audit. Used to enforce the 50B-cap rule.

cap_rule_passed.description: RED TEAM CONSTRAINT: True only if market_cap_usd < 50,000,000,000 (sub-$50B). Pulse MUST NOT execute if false.

bom_components.description: Bill-of-materials components extracted by Gemini from bottleneck_description.

supply_chain.description: Physical supply chain mapping extracted from SEC 10-K filings.

audit_failures.description: Non-fatal audit warnings (e.g., missing SEC data, low-confidence CAGR).

pulse.description: Execution gate and portfolio metadata from Module 3 (Pulse). Null until Auditor seals the audit_hash. MUST NOT be populated if auditor.cap_rule_passed = false.

execution_permitted.description: RED TEAM CONSTRAINT: Must be true AND auditor.audit_hash must be verified before any order is submitted. Computed as: audit_hash_valid AND cap_rule_passed AND tes_score >= tes_threshold.

execution_blocked_reason.description: Human-readable reason why execution_permitted = false. Required when execution_permitted is false.

tes_threshold_used.description: Minimum TES score required for execution_permitted = true. Default: 0.20.

macro_gate.description: Macro regime state at time of pulse evaluation.

kill_switch_active.description: True if SPY < 200 SMA (hard exit gate).

target_tickers.description: Resolved ticker symbols from supply chain mapping for portfolio targeting.

suggested_position_bias.description: Directional bias from TES + macro gate.

thesis_expiry_date.description: Date after which this TDO must be re-audited before Pulse can re-execute. Default: 90 days from audited_at.

execution_log.description: Immutable append-only log of all execution events referencing this TDO.

audit_hash_at_execution.description: Must match auditor.audit_hash. Mismatch = tampered TDO, block immediately.

red_team_constraints.description: Hard constraints enforced at schema level. Any module producing a TDO that violates these must raise an AuditConstraintError and halt.

market_cap_ceiling_usd.description: 50B-CAP RULE: Pulse MUST NOT build a position if auditor.market_cap_usd exceeds this value. Hard ceiling.

min_supporting_findings.description: Circuit breaker: Scout must supply at minimum this many findings above threshold. Below = LowSignalError.

min_composite_score.description: Minimum composite_score per finding to pass the Scout gatekeeper.

audit_hash_required_for_execution.description: EXECUTION GATE: Pulse is unconditionally prohibited from submitting any order if auditor.audit_hash is null or unverified.

max_thesis_age_days.description: TDOs older than this (from audited_at) require re-audit before Pulse can act. Default 90 days.

same_day_execution_gate_hours.description: CONTAMINATION GATE: Pulse must not execute on a TDO within this many hours of Scout emission. Prevents same-day signal feedback loop.

provenance.description: Audit trail of all module versions and timestamps that touched this TDO.

pipeline_run_id.description: Unique ID for the pipeline run that created this TDO (for log correlation).

git_sha_scout.description: Git commit SHA of alpha_scout at emission time.

git_sha_pulse.description: Git commit SHA of ai_supply_chain_trading at execution time.

scout.title: GaN Power Semiconductor Supply Constraint — Sub-$50B Beneficiaries
scout.thesis_claim: Gallium nitride power semiconductor demand will outpace supply through 2027 due to EV charger ramp and AI data center PDU upgrades, creating a structural margin expansion for tier-2 GaN fabs currently trading below $15B market cap.
scout.summary: Three independent supply chain analyses confirm GaN substrate capacity is running at 94% utilization globally. Two tier-2 fabs have filed provisional patents on new substrate techniques. SEC 10-K filings show 3 major hyperscalers adding GaN-specific supplier clauses.
scout.query_origin: GaN power semiconductor supply chain constraints 2026

supporting_findings.title: Gallium Nitride Substrate Capacity Constraints in High-Power Applications
supporting_findings.snippet: Current fab utilization exceeds 92% in top-5 GaN producers...

scout.critical_disagreement: SiC may substitute GaN in some EV applications above 800V — reduces addressable market by ~20%.
research_risks: Geopolitical: 60% of GaN substrates sourced from China
scout.bottleneck_description: GaN HEMT substrate fabrication requiring MOCVD reactors; constraint at epitaxial layer deposition step
